discover: location

DOWNTOWN MIAMI

MIAMI WORLDCENTER

FEATURES

AND AMENITIES

CHANGING RESIDENTIAL

HOSPITALITY FOREVER

Hotel Areas (Ground Level and Pedestal)

- Spectacular 40 ft. high lobby with glass elevators
- Signature International Restaurant
- Full-service café with locally sourced baked goods
- First of it’s kind International Business Lounge
- Grand Ballroom and Event Spaces
- Shul with Kosher Kitchen

One Acre Pool Deck (9th Floor)

- Largest downtown hotel pool deck
- Multiple water features and full-service pool
- Signature restaurant serving all meals
- Bar and Lounge
- Luxurious deck furniture
- Lush Landscaping
- Plush Cabanas

Rooftop Atrium and Event Space

- Decadent Lounge with seating amidst gardens
- Full Service Bar for Indoor and Outdoor seating
- Cantilevered, Infinity-edge, Singapore inspired pool


500-feet in the air
- Rooftop Sundeck with endless downtown views
- Plentiful Event Space

Center for Health

& Performance™

- 50,000 sq ft Medical Clinic with suites


for Health and Performance
- diagnostics and technology
- VIP Health Club with operating Rooms


and private VIP Entrance
- Advanced Performance Testing Center

Wellness

(Some costs may apply based on usage and procedures)

- Medical Fitness with Prescription for Health
- Vitality Spa
- Fitness studios
- Sports medicine/Physical therapy
- European styled Steam room
- Relaxing Sauna
- Altitude Training Room
- Cryotherapy Chambers
- Juice/Beverage bar
- IV Nutrition therapy

Legacy Hotel and Residences (942 NE 1st Avenue Condo) is situated above the Legacy Hotel and HAS unique access to certain amenities and features that may require fees to use. Please rely on the Prospectus and Condominium Documents presented to you for definitive information regarding all usage, access and benefits.

EVERYTHING

      HAS ITS PLACE


MICROLUXE™

RESIDENCE DESIGN

- Fully furnished MICROLUXE™ Residences
- Custom kitchen and bath cabinetry


with stone finishes
- Bosch (or comparable) Electric Stovetop
- Bosch (or comparable) Refrigerator/Freezer
- Fisher & Paykel (or comparable) Drawer Dish Washer
- Bosch (or comparable) Microwave
- LG (or comparable) all-in-one


washer and dryer
- Floor-to-ceiling glass windows

FLOOR PLANS

LEGACY IN THE NEWS

![](https://www.legacymwc.com/images-news/)

![](https://www.legacymwc.com/images-news/)

Legacy Hotel & Residences in Miami Worldcenter to total over 150,000 square feet after land purchase

May 26, 2022

The wellness component of the Legacy Hotel & Residences project at Miami Worldcenter is set to expand after the developer purchased a neighboring site.

[Read More...](https://www.legacymwc.com/media-detail/en/0/legacy-hotel--residences-in-miami-worldcenter-to-total-over-150000-square-feet-after-land-purchase)

![](https://www.legacymwc.com/images-news/)

![](https://www.legacymwc.com/images-news/)

Motwanis, Related to develop 450-unit condo tower at Miami Worldcenter

January 10, 2022

Related Group is partnering with Merrimac Ventures to co-develop a short-term rental-friendly condo tower within the master-planned, mixed-use Miami Worldcenter, The Real Deal has learned.

[Read More...](https://www.legacymwc.com/media-detail/en/0/motwanis-related-to-develop-450-unit-condo-tower-at-miami-worldcenter)

![](https://www.legacymwc.com/images-news/)

![](https://www.legacymwc.com/images-news/)

Miami Skyline Ignites Tallest Digital “Happy New Year” Count-Down Clock, Biggest Electronic Champagne Geyser, Largest Animated Fireworks at Paramount Miami Worldcenter

January 1, 2022

The world’s tallest electronic New Year’s Countdown Clock; the world’s biggest animated Champagne Geyser; and the world’s largest Digital Fireworks display light-up the South Florida skyline this holiday weekend, at the 60-story Paramount Miami Worldcenter skyscraper in downtown Miami, seen here at midnight, Saturday, January 1, 2022. The 700-foot-high Paramount Miami Worldcenter is the “Magic City’s” soaring signature residential tower, which features the world’s tallest and most technologically-advanced animation lighting system. It took 16,000 LEDs to create the spectacular light show in Miami, where thousands of revelers gathered in downtown and at the nearby Miley Cyrus New Year’s Eve Party, to ring in the new year.

[Read More...](https://www.legacymwc.com/media-detail/en/0/miami-skyline-ignites-tallest-digital-happy-new-year-count-down-clock-biggest-electronic-champagne-geyser-largest-animated-fireworks-at-paramount-miami-worldcenter)

READ MORE NEWS

web.description: Legacy Hotel & Residences will be a spectacular luxury building designed by Kobi Karp, located within 27-acre of the new Miami World Center. the mixed-use ...
web.markdown:
![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image01.png?v=c165982f)

ULTRA LUXURY MICRO RESIDENTIAL LIVING IN

THE NEW MIAMI WORLD CENTER

[En español](https://es.legacymiamiworldcenter.com/)

[⬆︎](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#gototop)

[![#home](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image15.png?v=c165982f)](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#home)

## 46 STORIES, 255 HOTEL ROOMS AND 278 RESIDENCES

Legacy Hotel & Residences will exist at the confluence of elegance and functionality.

**[Residences](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#residences)**

**[Floor Plans](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#floorplans)**

**[Amenities](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#amenities)**

**[Location](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#location)**

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#prices)**

**[Contact Us](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#contact)**

Now Under Construction.

Delivery 2027.

![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=c165982f)

![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=c165982f)

### One to Four Bedroom Configurations

## MICROLUXE RESIDENCE DESIGN

Legacy Hotel & Residences will exist at the confluence of elegance and functionality.State-of-the-art digital resources and ergonomic integration will be woven into living spaces that marry a refined quality of life with commercial practicality and ease of ownership and NO RENTAL RESTRICTIONS.\- FULLY FURNISHED RESIDENCES\- CUSTOM KITCHEN AND BATH CABINETRY WITH STONE FINISHES\- BOSCH ELECTRIC STOVETOP / MICROWAVE / REFRIGERATOR\- ELECTROLUX WASHER AND DRYER\- FLOOR-TO-CEILING GLASS WINDOWS

Click the photos for more details

- [![FLOOR-TO-CEILING GLASS WINDOWS](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/gallery02/8fdf1560_original.jpg?v=c165982f)

- [![FULLY FURNISHED RESIDENCES](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/gallery02/3d91b91d.jpg?v=c165982f)](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/gallery02/3d91b91d_original.jpg?v=c165982f)

![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image09.jpg?v=c165982f)

Luxury Residences

## LEGACY MIAMI IS THE FIRST HIGH-END RESIDENTIAL EXPERIENCE

All micro-lux residences feature custom kitchen & baths cabinetry, stone finishes, bosch kitchen appliances, electrolux washer and dryer and floor-to-ceiling glass windows. All units enjoy amazing city views, with a mix of exposure to the new luxury highrises built recently in the area, as well as some partial bay views

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#prices)**

**[Floor Plans](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#floorplans)**

**[Location](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#location)**

**[Contact Us](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/#contact)**

### Spectacular Common Areas

## LEGACY MIAMI IS THE FIRST HIGH-END RESIDENTIAL EXPERIENCE THAT INCORPORATES A HOLISTIC LIFESTYLE AND GUEST EXPERIENCE WILL NO OTHER.

Amenities will include: The atrium, two stories of common areas in the building's rooftop with a pool, social lounges, and a clear structure which ensures amazing city views, The Miami’s First International Business lounge; Medical and Wellness Center which will offer unparalleled access to the best practitioners and technology in the areas of health, wellness, beauty and longevity.Its privileged location in Downtown Miami makes it even more attractive… You'll live only a few blocks from the American Airlines Arena, Art Basel, Boat Shows, Music Festivals, Book Fairs, Brickell's Financial District, the Miami Port, Wynwood, Miami's International Airport, Beaches, the future train to Orlando and so much more!

Click the photos for more details

![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image03.jpg?v=c165982f)

![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=c165982f)

## THE LOCATION

LOCATED IN THE NEW MIAMI WORLD CENTER

Miami World Center is stated to be a magnetic destination for tourists and business visitors in the heart of Downtown.This is the biggest mixed-use development in the U.S. after New York’s Hudson Yards. At nearly 30 acres, Miami World Center achieves the heights of a world-class destination. It is within walking distance of more than $5 billion in new public and private projects in mass transit, cultural institutions, recreational parks, and entertainment venues. A dynamic urban core of diversity and excitement,Miami World Center brings a new energy to Miami with a compelling blend of exceptional retail, hospitality, residential, and commercial offerings in one unique location, including the new Virgin Miami Central, with the future luxury train to Orlando.

Building Address:

[1010 Northeast 2nd Avenue Miami, FL 33132](https://goo.gl/maps/iCh9stVk3iTz1UPT8)

\- Brickell: 10 minutes’ walk

\- Museums & Arena: 5 minutes’ walk

\- Train to Orlando: 3 minutes’ walk

\- Wynwood: 5 minutes’ drive

\- Miami Beaches: 15 minutes’ drive

\- Miami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive

## THE TEAM

**DEVELOPERS**

ROYAL PALM COMPANIES**ARCHITECT**

ID & DESIGN INTERNATIONAL**INTERIOR DESIGN**

KOBI KARP

![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=c165982f)

![](https://legacymiamiworldcenter.com/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=c165982f)

## Developers

RPC is an award-winning real estate developer and enjoys a 40-year reputation of creating exquisite large-scale, amenity- rich properties. Its profitable portfolio of completed projects include Mixed-Use, Condominium & Planned Residential Communities, Multi-Family Apartment Complexes, Hospitality including Vacation Rentals, Second Homes, and Serviced Residences. Since the 1970’s, RPC has completed more than 50 different developments, representing more than 6,000 income-producing units, totaling more than $2.5 billion in asset value. These are other Luxury Developments of the Developer in Florida: Paramount Miami World Center, Paramount Bay Edgewater, Harbour Isles, Hyatt Regency, Paramount Fort Lauderdale Beach, The Mirage, Barefoot Beach, Esplanade Grande, Estero Oaks, Villagio, Dania Beach Residences, Gardens at Beachwalk and Palma Vista.

og:description: Legacy Hotel & Residences will be a spectacular luxury building designed by Kobi Karp, located within 27-acre of the new Miami World Center. the mixed-use project is comprised of 39 stories, 255 hotel rooms and 278 residences with no rental restrictions, allowing investors to maximize their income capacity.
Have any questions? Talk with us directly using LiveChat.
